# NEUS Copilot Instructions

Read `.neus/context/COMPILED_CONTEXT.md` first. Then read NEUS-POLICY.md for the anti-drift gate and classification system.

Canonical source: `_workspace`. Repo-local `.neus/context` is generated.

Classify every request before acting (see NEUS-POLICY.md). Use existing production paths. No parallel systems. Prefer in-place edits. Verify before claiming success. Route high-risk actions through the trust harness.
